additional_diagnostics.message: Adreno GPU 操作耗时 ${dur_ms}ms，可能影响渲染
suggestions: 检查是否有复杂的 GPU 计算

additional_steps.name: 高通平台事件
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as qcom_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*QTI*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Qualcomm*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*qcom*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*QSEE*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: Adreno GPU 分析
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as gpu_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*Adreno*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*adreno*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*gpu*fence*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*kgsl*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC
LIMIT 20

additional_steps.name: 高通性能服务
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as perf_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*perf-hal*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*perflock*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*boost*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*hint*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: DSP/NPU 使用分析
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as dsp_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*DSP*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*NPU*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Hexagon*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*CDSP*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

meta.description: 针对高通 Snapdragon 平台优化的启动分析
